mapper.select: SELECT m.* FROM matches m JOIN team ts ON m.team_name = ts.team_name WHERE ts.team_league_gb = 'k5' AND m.match_score IS NULL AND m.league_gb = 'k5'
SELECT m.* FROM matches m JOIN team ts ON m.team_name = ts.team_name WHERE ts.team_league_gb = 'k5' AND m.match_score is not null
select t.* from team t join matches m on m.team_name = t.team_name where m.league_gb = 'k5'
SELECT m.* FROM matches m JOIN team ts ON m.team_name = ts.team_name WHERE ts.team_league_gb = 'k7' AND m.match_score IS NULL AND m.league_gb = 'k7'
SELECT m.* FROM matches m JOIN team ts ON m.team_name = ts.team_name WHERE ts.team_league_gb = 'k7' AND m.match_score is not null
SELECT m.* FROM matches m JOIN team ts ON m.team_name = ts.team_name WHERE ts.team_league_gb = 'w1' AND m.match_score IS NULL AND m.league_gb = 'w1'
SELECT m.* FROM matches m JOIN team ts ON m.team_name = ts.team_name WHERE ts.team_league_gb = 'w1' AND m.match_score is not null
